The '''Kaiburr Crystal''' was a type of [[cocktail]]. It was the rarest and most valuable cocktail in [[the galaxy]]. The cocktail was served in a [[camtono]].<ref name="Hyperspace Lounge" />

{{Food-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The Kaiburr Crystal was served at the immersive bar [[Star Wars: Hyperspace Lounge|''Star Wars'': Hyperspace Lounge]] aboard the cruise ship [[Wikipedia:Disney Wish|''Disney Wish'']].<ref name="Hyperspace Lounge" /> The cocktail was served in a camtono. When it opened, it revealed four small silver cups with various cocktails. Outside of the small drinks, the customer also receives ''[[Star Wars]]'' merchandise, a bottle of "Skywalker Sommita Sparkling Wine," and a certificate that entitles them to a private four-person tour of the [[Skywalker Ranch]] and its vineyards.<ref name="Kaiburr">{{WebCite|url=https://www.wdwradio.com/2022/07/is-the-5000-kaiburr-crystal-cocktail-on-the-disney-wish-worth-it-we-found-out-ourselves-and/|text=Is The $5000 Kaiburr Crystal Cocktail on the Disney Wish Worth It? Beci Found Out For Herself and…|author=Beci Mahnken|date=2022-07-25|work=WDW Radio|archivedate=20231024050227}}</ref>
